reasoning: Clear risk-off sector rotation. XLK -0.40% and XLF -0.87% (growth + financials selling hard) while XLE surges +3.01% — classic flight-to-safety into inflation hedge. Tech and financial weakness dragging SPY -0.41%. VIX rising +4.17% in premarket confirms elevated fear. Breadth is negative: both XLK and XLF underperforming SPY with financial hit worse than broad market. Energy outperformance by 3.41% vs tech signals strong risk-off bias. Bearish breadth picture contradicts equity upside.
key_observations: XLK -0.40%: Tech sector weakness — SPY's largest component under pressure
XLF -0.87%: Financials hit even harder than SPY — credit/rate concerns
XLE +3.01%: Energy massive outperformance — inflation fears driving rotation out of growth into defensive
Overall rotation: Risk-off confirmed. Growth sectors selling, inflation hedge (energy) buying. VIX +4.17% supports elevated fear tone.
